back_translation: A psalm of David, when he fled from Absalom his son.
O LORD, my foes are very many; many rise up against me.
Many say of me, 'There is no salvation for him in God.' Selah
But You, O LORD, are a shield around me, my glory, and the One who lifts up my head.
I cry aloud with my voice to the LORD, and He answers me from His holy mountain. Selah
I lay down and slept; I awoke, for the LORD sustains me.
I will not fear the tens of thousands of people who set themselves around against me.
O LORD, arise! O my God, save me! For You have struck all my enemies on the cheek; You have broken the teeth of the wicked.
Salvation belongs to the LORD; may Your blessing be upon Your people. Selah
